FX.title: [USD/JPY] UP: Intervention Failures Sustain Yen Weakness as Technical Resistance Looms
tldr_points: BoJ/MOF intervention attempts fail to arrest yen depreciation
US-Japan consensus on volatility suppression limits downside tail risk
Technical rebound off key support validates bullish structure
FX.excerpt: Yen slide persists despite intervention rhetoric; buy dips toward structural support.
FX.comment: Intervention failures sustain yen weakness; buy dips into MA20 support

STOCKS.title: [S&P 500] DOWN: Inflation Jitters Drive Technical Breakdown
tldr_points: Inflation concerns and rate hike expectations driving market pressure
S&P 500 futures showing bearish momentum ahead of CPI report
Growth tech stocks facing mixed sentiment amid broader market uncertainty
STOCKS.excerpt: Market pressured by inflation jitters, rate concerns, and pre-CPI weakness. S&P 500 shows bearish technical structure.
STOCKS.comment: Inflation pressures and technical breakdown signal downside potential

CRYPTO.title: [BTC/USD] UP: ETF Inflows and Circle Target Signal Recovery (Source: Arkham, Bernstein)
tldr_points: Bhutan outflows top $230M but XRP ETF inflows hit $26M
Bernstein maintains $190 Circle target amid ARC presale
Exodus Q1 loss widens as revenue falls 37%
CRYPTO.excerpt: BTC/USD poised for upside on XRP ETF inflows and Circle price target amid mixed outflows.
CRYPTO.comment: ETF inflows and Circle target offset outflows, supporting upside recovery.
